title: As a user, I want to log in with email and password so that I can access my account
description: Implement secure user authentication with email and password credentials including validation and error handling.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter email and password on the login page
System validates credentials against the database
Valid credentials redirect user to the dashboard
Invalid credentials show a clear error message
Account is locked after 5 failed attempts

title: Build the entire analytics module with dashboards, reports, real-time data export, ML predictions, and alert system
description: Complete analytics system covering all data visualization, reporting, and machine learning features.

title: As a manager, I want to view team performance reports so that I can track productivity
description: A dashboard view showing team velocity, completed stories, and sprint burndown charts filtered by date range.
acceptance_criteria: Manager can filter reports by sprint or date range
Reports show team velocity and completion rates
Burndown chart is visible per sprint
Data can be exported as CSV

title: As a user, I want real-time notifications so that I stay informed of important events instantly
description: Implement a real-time notification system using WebSockets that pushes updates to users immediately as events occur. This includes backend event publishing, client connection management, and UI display components.
acceptance_criteria: Notifications are delivered in under 5 seconds of the event without requiring a page refresh
Users receive only notifications relevant to their permissions and subscriptions
The system gracefully handles disconnects with automatic reconnection
Notifications are displayed in both a toast format and a persistent inbox view

title: As a user, I want to update my profile information so that my account stays current
description: Allow users to edit their name, email address, and profile avatar from the settings page.
acceptance_criteria: User can edit name, email, and avatar
Changes are saved with a confirmation message
Validation errors are displayed inline
Email change triggers a verification email

title: As an admin, I want to assign roles to users so that access is properly controlled
description: Role management interface for admins to assign and revoke user roles.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view all users and their current roles
Admin can assign or revoke roles
Role changes take effect immediately without re-login

title: Migrate the entire legacy database, refactor all REST APIs, update frontend to new design system, write complete documentation, and deploy to cloud
As a user, I want the app to establish and maintain a WebSocket connection so that I can receive real-time updates
description: Implement client-side WebSocket connection logic with reconnection handling.
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket connects automatically on user login
Connection status is monitored and logged
Automatic reconnect occurs on failure (with backoff)
Connection is closed cleanly on logout

title: As a user, I want to see incoming notifications in the UI so that I can view and interact with them
description: Build frontend components to listen for messages and render notifications as toasts and in a notification center.
acceptance_criteria: Real-time notification appears as a dismissible toast
Notification badge updates on the navigation icon
Clicking a notification marks it read and navigates to the related context
Notifications are persisted in local state for the session

title: As a developer, I want to publish events from the backend so that relevant notifications are sent in real-time
description: Add backend logic to emit notification events over WebSockets when key actions occur in the system.
acceptance_criteria: Event is published to the correct user channel on trigger (e.g. new message)
Payload includes title, body, timestamp and link
Only authenticated and authorized users receive events
Unit and integration tests confirm event flow end-to-end
